Row.Text: Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.
Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.
Tier 2 Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.
Tier 3 Mycenaean Unique Infantry Unit. Heals +10 [icon:Action_Heal] HP from [icon:Action_Pillage] Pillaging any tile. Has the Amphibious ability.

Mycenaean Unique Merchant. Civilian who can establish a [icon:TRADE_ROUTE] Trade Route to import [icon:RADIAL_RESOURCES] Resources from a foreign Settlement. Gain 35 [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold for each [icon:RADIAL_RESOURCES] Resource acquired when creating a naval [icon:TRADE_ROUTE] Trade Route.
